name: Browserless: Headless Browser Automation & Scraping
snippet: The real-time browser infrastructure behind 173M+ Docker pulls. Scrape, automate, and run AI agents with Puppeteer or Playwright. No DevOps, no credit card.

name: Browserless API Guide: REST Endpoints, CDP WebSockets, and
snippet: Browserless API gives you two connection models: REST endpoints for screenshot/PDF/scrape, and CDP WebSockets for Playwright or Puppeteer.

name: Browserless browser automation infrastructure - HeyClaude
snippet: Browserless provides managed and self-hostable headless browser infrastructure for Puppeteer, Playwright, REST APIs, BrowserQL, and AI automation.
